name: The Perverted Feminizing Professor
description:
What does a Tenured Professor have to lose?

Welcome to Kalreth Academy! You are a recent transfer student starting your first year at the academy, and the prestigious Professor Haslo has taken a quick liking to you.. Haslo has a bit of a reputation.. he is a very educated man and has been at the academy for over twenty years now. Almost every graduating class however, he picks a pupil.. one to mold and "educate" and oh boy does he..

Some Notes:

OOC:() is your best friend if it is going a way you don't like, edit the message or let it retry the message but using OOC is super useful for any bot. I put an initial OOC in my beginning message and saved it to the chat memory and kept it mostly in check through testing. At this point if any other bot creators find my bots, any tips/advice to actually make the bots commit to slow burn would be great! I'm trying to figure it out haha.

If you have any feedback or suggestions I would love to hear them, I want to know how to make the bots better, I like the creation of bots and would love to learn how to make more and more of you enjoy them! <3

Pretty happy how this big fella turned out, I hope you have fun with him!
creator: mattnicks
